titleStmt.title: SII 41.266: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 266. (A.R. No. 483 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, right of entrance.

summary.p: Incomplete and damaged. Contains only the historical introduction of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyum cirttaniccelviyum tanperun=teviyarākki Inpuṟa nerituyaruḻiyuḷiṭaituṟai nāṭuntuṭarvana velippaṭarvana vāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum po
rukaṭaliḻattaraicartam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkalt tenṉavar vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramun=teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷar muṟaimaiyiṟcūṭuṅkulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelaitto
l peruṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinavilirupat torukālaracukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāman mellaruñcān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karutiyiruttiya cempoṟ cīrttarumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyal mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉa Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭupiṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanitikkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭ
ṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivalaiya nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻanamācuni tecamum Ayarvilvaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉṟolkulattirarataṉai vilaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷai Oṭum piṭittup perun tanattoṭu niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷaioṭṭa viṣaiyamu
mpūcurar cernaṟ kocalaināṭun=taṉmapālaṉaivemuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colaittaṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟattākkit tikkaṇakirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻinn=toṭa taṅkāta cāralvaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaḻaṟcaṅku voṭaṭal mahipālaṉaiveñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nittila neṭuṅka
ṭal Uttiralāṭamum ceṟimalarttirttat teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapaṉmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉaivākaiyum porukaṭalk kumpakkari Oṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya peruneṟippiṟakkamum Ārttavar nakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum moyttoḻilp puṉamaṇipputavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum ni
ṟai cirvicaiyamum tuṟai nirppaṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyūraiyiṟṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcuḻ māyiruṭiliṅkamum kalaṅkāval viṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamum kāvalam puricaimevirupaṅkamum viḷaipantūruṭai vaḷaippantūrum kalaiktakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalviṉai mātamāliṅkamum kalāmutirk
[kaṭun=tiṟal*] Ilāmuṟitecamum te kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra coḻa devarkku yāṇṭu
Digital edition of SII 41.266 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
